description_long: This vase features a distinctive double-gourd silhouette with a wide, flared base and top, and a rounded central body. The surface appears to be made of a matte, stone-like material with a slightly rough texture, giving it a hand-crafted, rustic appearance. Two curved, golden handles are attached symmetrically to the upper portion of the central body, adding a decorative and functional element. The handles stand out due to their metallic sheen and contrast with the otherwise gray body. The vase has a hollow interior, suitable for holding flowers or other decorative items. There are no visible patterns or painted motifs, emphasizing its minimalist and sculptural form.
description: A gray, double-gourd vase with a rough stone-like finish and two golden curved handles, featuring a minimalist, sculptural design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both golden handles symmetrically attached to the central body.
description_view_1: Side view with only one handle visible and the other obscured, highlighting the vase's profile and flared base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both golden handles visible and the same double-gourd shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing only one handle and the vase's profile.
